message:
Fix: batch lines to stay under 100 image limit

- Anthropic API limit: 100 images per request
- Group lines into batches: ceil(lines / 100) lines per batch
- Example: 912 lines → 92 batches (10 lines/batch) ✓
- Each batch = one image with multiple lines
- Still compare total tokens: batched images vs text
- Slightly more pixels (vertical whitespace), but still 89%+ savings
